zh.lifeSummary: 當Christiana FitzAlan於大約1143年出生在英國史洛普爾可倫時，她的父親William FitzAlan Lord of Oswestry39歲，母親Christiana32歲。她和Hugh Pantulf至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1227年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾維姆享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christiana FitzAlan于大约1143年出生在英国史洛普爾可倫时，她的父亲William FitzAlan Lord of Oswestry39岁，母亲Christiana32岁。她和Hugh Pantulf至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于大约1227年在英国英格兰史洛普爾維姆享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Christiana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval learned feminine form of Christian . As a recent revival it represents an elaborated form of Christina . It is also sometimes spelled Christianna , under the influence of the name Anna .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Christiana FitzAlan was born about 1143, in Clun, Shropshire, England, her father, William FitzAlan Lord of Oswestry, was 39 and her mother, Christiana, was 32. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Hugh Pantulf. She died about 1227, in Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christiana FitzAlan est née environ 1143, à Clun, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, William FitzAlan Lord of Oswestry, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Christiana, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Hugh Pantulf. Elle est décédée environ 1227, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christiana FitzAlan um 1143 in Clun, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William FitzAlan Lord of Oswestry 39 und ihre Mutter Christiana 32. Sie hatte mit Hugh Pantulf mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1227 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christiana FitzAlan è nata il circa 1143 nel Clun, Shropshire, England, sua padre, William FitzAlan Lord of Oswestry, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Christiana, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Hugh Pantulf. Morì circa 1227, nel Wem, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christiana FitzAlanが約1143年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアクルンで生まれた時，父William FitzAlan Lord of Oswestryは39歳，母Christianaは32歳であった。彼女はHugh Pantulfとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1227年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエムで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christiana FitzAlan(이)가 대략 1143년 영국 슈럽실르 클루에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzAlan Lord of Oswestry(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christiana(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Hugh Pantulf(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1227년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 베에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christiana FitzAlan nasceu aproximadamente 1143, em Clun, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzAlan Lord of Oswestry, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Christiana, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Hugh Pantulf. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1227, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christiana FitzAlan родилась около 1143 г. в местности клун, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William FitzAlan Lord of Oswestry было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiana, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Hugh Pantulf. Она умерла около 1227 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Hugh Pantulf. Murió aproximadamente 1227, en Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años.
